---
title: "daemon.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\.agents\skills\daemon.py"
loc: 10
complexity: 2
logic_score: 7.75
style_score: 4.12
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.81
---

## Intent
The `daemon.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on internal logic. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via internal logic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 2 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [ravens](file://ravens)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
